attempts.strategy: Adopt the probe-confirmed term-mode .of_iso-chain body verbatim from REFACTOR_DIRECTIVE.md - exact mirror of Mathlib MayerVietorisSquare.isPushoutAddCommGrpFreeSheaf L156-160 with the substitution AddCommGrpCat.free -> ModuleCat.free k.
attempts.code_tried:
lemma HModule'_isPushoutModuleCatFreeSheaf
    (k : Type u) [Field k]
    {C : Type v} [Category.{u, v} C] {J : GrothendieckTopology C}
    [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)]
    (S : J.MayerVietorisSquare) :
    (S.map (yoneda ⋙ (Functor.whiskeringRight _ _ _).obj (ModuleCat.free k) ⋙
      presheafToSheaf J _)).IsPushout :=
  (S.isPushout.map (Sheaf.composeAndSheafify J (ModuleCat.free k))).of_iso
    ((Square.mapFunctor.mapIso
      (presheafToSheafCompComposeAndSheafifyIso J (ModuleCat.free k))).app
        (S.map yoneda))
attempts.insight: The construction crucially depends on Sheaf.composeAndSheafify J (ModuleCat.free k) preserving pushouts, which in turn requires (ModuleCat.free k).IsLeftAdjoint (Target 1). Square.mapFunctor.mapIso is value-category-agnostic. Minimal typeclass stack [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)] is sufficient (no [HasExt ...] needed).

next_steps: Used by HModule'_shortComplex.zero (cokernelCofork.condition); iter-020+ Mono/Epi/Exact derivations consume the pushout structure.

attempts.strategy: Adopt the probe-confirmed structure-literal body verbatim from REFACTOR_DIRECTIVE.md - exact mirror of Mathlib MayerVietorisSquare.shortComplex L235-249 with the substitution AddCommGrpCat.free -> ModuleCat.free k. Five Type-valued fields (X1, X2, X3, f, g) plus one Prop-valued zero field (cokernelCofork.condition).
attempts.code_tried:
@[simps]
noncomputable def HModule'_shortComplex
    (k : Type u) [Field k]
    {C : Type v} [Category.{u, v} C] {J : GrothendieckTopology C}
    [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)]
    (S : J.MayerVietorisSquare) :
    ShortComplex (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k)) where
  X₁ := (presheafToSheaf J _).obj (yoneda.obj S.X₁ ⋙ ModuleCat.free k)
  X₂ := (presheafToSheaf J _).obj (yoneda.obj S.X₂ ⋙ ModuleCat.free k) ⊞
    (presheafToSheaf J _).obj (yoneda.obj S.X₃ ⋙ ModuleCat.free k)
  X₃ := (presheafToSheaf J _).obj (yoneda.obj S.X₄ ⋙ ModuleCat.free k)
  f :=
    biprod.lift
      ((presheafToSheaf J _).map (Functor.whiskerRight (yoneda.map S.f₁₂) _))
      (-(presheafToSheaf J _).map (Functor.whiskerRight (yoneda.map S.f₁₃) _))
  g :=
    biprod.desc
      ((presheafToSheaf J _).map (Functor.whiskerRight (yoneda.map S.f₂₄) _))
      ((presheafToSheaf J _).map (Functor.whiskerRight (yoneda.map S.f₃₄) _))
  zero :=
    (S.map (yoneda ⋙ (Functor.whiskeringRight _ _ _).obj (ModuleCat.free k) ⋙
        presheafToSheaf J _)).cokernelCofork.condition
attempts.goal_before: structure synthesis goal: ShortComplex (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))
attempts.insight: Structure-literal where-form is the direct Mathlib-mirroring shape for ShortComplex. The Prop-valued zero field is closed term-mode by the cokernelCofork.condition of the pushed-through square in Target 2 - value-category-agnostic, transfers verbatim. Alternating-sum sign on f's second branch (via -(...)) preserves the convention compatible with iter-018 toBiprod_fromBiprod. @[simps] generates auto-derived projection lemmas HModule'_shortComplex_X₁ / .._X₂ / .._X₃ / .._f / .._g consumed by iter-020+ exactness derivations and iter-022+ delta connecting hom.

next_steps: Iter-020+ derives Mono on f, Epi on g, Exact instance via ShortComplex.exact_of_g_is_cokernel; iter-021 packages the trio into ShortExact; iter-022+ defines the connecting hom delta via S.shortComplex_shortExact.extClass.precomp.
